email_body:
Workspace fundamentals, done right.



You’ve got momentum building, nice! Here are a few ways to help make things even easier. These short videos cover the essentials so your pages stay organized, your data is structured and you can actually find and share things.



( https://academy.notion.com/building-basics/323676/scorm/yz9o79x912bs?utm_campaign=%5BUpdated%5D+Creator+Onboarding+2025&utm_campaignid=652&utm_campaigntype=transactional&utm_content=Email+6-+Education&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
